source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Elegant gallery display headings paired with practical sans product UI; Noto Sans guidance for Japanese labels and multilingual previews.
layout: 8px grid, restrained 8px panels, feather-bar dividers, eye-spot focus rings, brass hairline borders, and dense gallery/dashboard surfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent peafowl feather motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a single peafowl eye feather, isolated complete feather, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: an elegant peacock eye feather with accurate barbs, iridescent teal and cobalt eye, bronze-gold ring, fine filament details, natural shaft and delicate taper.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the feather. Feather angled slightly diagonal for graceful gallery use.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves iridescent natural color and feather texture detail.
Transparent workflow: place the feather on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no decorative background, no second feather, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Peafowl Feather", a decorative gallery system inspired by a peacock eye feather in a monsoon garden.
Motif source: Use an iridescent peafowl eye feather as the source of truth: teal, cobalt, bronze, antique gold, moss green, ink navy, soft ivory neutrals, fine feather-line texture, and rainwashed garden atmosphere.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source board, preferred 3840x2160. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Peafowl Feather", motif story, palette swatches, typography, Japanese typography, buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command/search, navigation, dashboard charts, empty/error/loading states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, semantic tokens, generated asset examples.
Typography: refined multilingual product UI guidance for English and Japanese, elegant gallery editorial headings with practical sans UI text.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style light mode product design system, precise grid, decorative gallery system, 8px card radius, crisp controls, subtle feather-eye outlines, rainwashed ivory background, brass dividers, teal/cobalt interaction states.
Color palette: use only motif-derived teal cobalt bronze gold moss navy and near-neutrals from feather highlights.
Text: short readable UI labels only; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no illegible tiny token tables.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Peafowl Feather", a decorative gallery system inspired by a peacock eye feather in a monsoon garden. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Motif source: Use an iridescent peafowl eye feather as the source of truth: luminous teal, cobalt, bronze, antique gold, moss green, ink navy, rainwater highlights, fine feather-line texture, and monsoon garden atmosphere.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source board, preferred 3840x2160. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Peafowl Feather", Dark Mode, motif story, palette swatches, typography, Japanese typography, buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command/search, navigation, dashboard charts, empty/error/loading states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, semantic tokens, generated asset examples.
Typography: refined multilingual product UI guidance for English and Japanese, elegant gallery editorial headings with practical sans UI text.
Visual details: deep ink navy background from the feather eye, elevated cards in blue-black and dark teal, light text from pearl feather highlights, antique gold borders, bronze warning accents, teal/cobalt focused states, subtle feather-eye linework and rain texture overlays.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style dark mode product design system, precise grid, decorative gallery system, 8px card radius, crisp controls.
Color palette: use only motif-derived teal cobalt bronze gold moss navy and near-neutrals from feather highlights.
Text: short readable UI labels only; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no flat pure black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no watermark, no random brand names, no illegible tiny token tables.
